name: do-or-wait-firestore
description: Read and write the do-or-wait Firestore database (tasks, leads, notes, availability, pricing, renewals) so the web app updates live.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get one task thread in full.

tools.name: add_task_update
tools.description: Append an update to a task thread.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Rename or archive a task thread.

tools.name: update_lead
tools.description: Update top-level fields on a lead.

tools.name: add_lead_update
tools.description: Append a classified update to a lead.

tools.name: trigger_availability_sync
tools.description: Run the availability sync for one location.

tools.name: sync_all_locations
tools.description: Run the availability sync for every location.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Read any Firestore document by collection + id.
